ApiSchema.description: Subset of the Gemini Schema object used for function and response schemas.

Blob.description: Inline bytes for image, audio, or video content.

Content.description: Contains the multi-part content of a message.

role.description: Producer of the content. Common values are `user` and `model`.

downloadUri.description: Download URI for downloadable files, such as generated batch result files. The official Files guide says uploaded files cannot be downloaded.

source.description: Use `GENERATED` plus `downloadUri` or the guide-documented `/download/v1beta/...:download` route for downloadable batch result files. Uploaded files are not downloadable.

FileData.description: URI-based file reference used inside message parts.

GenerationConfig.description: Configuration options for model generation and outputs.

GenericJsonObject.description: Placeholder schema. This repo only promotes request and response shapes to concrete schemas when they are verified against a current machine-readable upstream source.

GoogleDuration.description: Duration string ending in `s`, for example `3.5s`.

metadata.description: Operation-specific metadata. Structure varies by endpoint.

response.description: Operation result. Structure varies by endpoint.

Part.description: A single part of a multi-part message.

info.description: Generated working OpenAPI spec for the documented Gemini Developer API surface. Path and method coverage come primarily from the live `all-methods` docs, with guide-documented extras added from their dedicated reference pages.
info.title: Gemini Developer API

get.description: Downloads generated file bytes. Officially documented in the Gemini Batch API guide for batch result files.

parameters.description: ID within the `files` collection. Pass just the resource ID, not the full path. Original parameter name: `name`. Original binding token: `{name=files/*}`
parameters.name: file

parameters.description: Required media download mode documented in the Batch API guide.
parameters.name: alt

parameters.description: ID within the `fileSearchStores` collection. Pass just the resource ID, not the full path. Original parameter name: `fileSearchStoreName`. Original binding token: `{fileSearchStoreName=fileSearchStores/*}`
parameters.name: fileSearchStore

requestBody.description: Google requires multipart/related or resumable upload protocol. The content types shown here are a simplified representation. See the Gemini Files API guide for the actual upload flow.
Google requires multipart/related or resumable upload protocol. The content types shown here are a simplified representation. See the Gemini Files API guide for the actual upload flow.
